class.name: E3DModelManager
class.brief_description: Loads and caches MaSzyna E3D models.
class.description: [E3DModelManager] is an engine singleton responsible for loading [code].e3d[/code] files and caching parsed [E3DModel] resources. It is used by [E3DModelInstance] when a model is referenced through path and filename instead of a direct resource.

method.name: clear_cache
method.description: Clears the internal cache of previously loaded E3D models.

method.name: load_model
method.description: Loads an [E3DModel] from the given base directory and filename, using the manager cache when possible.
